CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2002 Continued To Mar-20-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Counsel present. The arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 2/21/2003. The OSC is re-set to 3/20/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. (Stipulation to mediate to be submitted). Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

Motion For Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PENINSULA FORD OF BURLINGAME, INC. Motion For Transfer (venue to San Mateo County):
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling (1.DENY IMPROPER VENUE: DEFENDANT HAS WAIVED RIGHT TO CHALLENGE ISSUE OF IMPROPER VENUE BECAUSE HE DID NOT FILE THE MOTION WITHIN TIME PERMITTED TO FILE AN ANSWER/DEMURRER.
2.DENY WITHOUT PREJUDICE CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES AND ENDS OF JUSTICE: DEFENDANT HAS CHALLENGED VENUE ON THESE GROUNDS PREMATURELY. THIS MOTION MAY ONLY BE MADE AFTER FILING AN ANSWER). (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2002 Continued To Nov-21-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
